TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Clarence_Brookins, title = Clarence_Brookins, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Clarence_Brookins} }

S.FORM: Clarence Brookins sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1946, kinhulan nya ga American, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 193 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 86 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1968 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Philadelphia 76ers. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Clarence Brookins sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1946, kinhulan nya ga American, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 193 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 86 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1968 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Philadelphia 76ers. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨlarenʦ~ʨe βrookins~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, kinħulan nja ɣa ameriʦ~ʨan, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu pħila*elpħia **ers~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
